items.author: NYT Business
items.text: ’60 Minutes’ Journalist Sharyn Alfonsi Loses Deal After Dispute With Bari Weiss
items.summary: Sharyn Alfonsi, whose segment on a brutal Salvadoran prison was pulled abruptly in December, said that CBS News and its top editor, Bari Weiss, had let her contract expire.
items.text_it: La giornalista di ’60 Minutes’ Sharyn Alfonsi perde l'accordo dopo la disputa con Bari Weiss
items.summary_it: Sharyn Alfonsi, il cui segmento su una brutale prigione salvadoregna è stato ritirato bruscamente a dicembre, ha affermato che CBS News e il suo direttore principale, Bari Weiss, avevano lasciato scadere il suo contratto.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: Ferrari’s First Electric Car Runs Into Backlash in Italy and Beyond
items.summary: Memes mocked the new model, analysts questioned its appeal and investors sold the automaker’s stock. A former Ferrari chairman warned of “the destruction of a legend.”
